  sl  local_address                         rem_address                        st tx_queue rx_queue tr tm->when retrnsmt   uid  timeout inode
   0: 00000000000000000000000000000000:207D 00000000000000000000000000000000:0000 0A 00000000:00000000 00:00000000 00000000 1000 0 4
   1: 0000000000000000FFFF00000100007F:01BB 00000000000000000000000000000000:0000 01 00000000:00000000 00:00000000 00000000 1000 0 5
